---
about:
  template: jolla
  id: about-block
  image: "img/my_image.png"
  links:
    - icon: facebook
      text: Facebook
      href: https://www.facebook.com/lily.zhang.167284
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/lily-zhang-29b78b257/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto: shitao.zhang@case.edu"  
---

::: {#about-block}
:::

# Welcome to my website!

I am Lily (Shi-tao) Zhang who is trying to be a good bio-statistician. 

My interest in biology began after reading a biography of Jane Goodall. Her lifelong dedication to understanding chimpanzee behavior deeply inspired me and motivated me to pursue a path in biological research.

After earning my PhD in Biochemistry and Molecular Biology, I came to the United States to continue developing my research skills. Through my training, I became increasingly drawn to working with data-especially the process of uncovering patterns and generating insights from complex data sets. During my PhD, I developed strong interests in coding and statistical analysis, and I found that this data-driven approach was where I could make the most meaningful impact. This experience ultimately led me to pursue further training in bio-statistics.

On this website, you will find my published works, and also find news and updates on my current research projects. I invite you to explore my website and learn more about me. Please feel free to [contact me](mailto:shitao.zhang@case.edu) if you have any questions or would like to discuss potential projects.
